exploration_notes: Migrated all non-vendor, non-generated grpc.Dial() and grpc.DialContext() calls to grpc.NewClient() across etcd (4 files) and kubernetes (15 files). Containerd had no non-vendor/generated calls to migrate. For DialContext→NewClient, the context argument was removed. Where the context variable was only used for the dial call (local WithTimeout blocks), the dead code was cleaned up. Unused imports (context, time) were also removed where needed.
